name: Dillbrot (Dill Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the cottage cheese until lukewarm.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
3. Combine all ingredients except flour in a mixing bowl, adding flour gradually. Beat until well mixed and stiff but not heavy (standard bread dough feeling).
4. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled.
5. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf or arrange in a round on a greased cookie sheet. Let rise again.
6. Bake for 30 to 45 minutes at 350 degrees F.
7. While still warm, brush the loaf with softened butter and sprinkle generously with salt.
